name: Unarmored / Bare Flesh
desc: No significant protection. Skin or light covering only.

name: Feathers
desc: Light feather covering. Modest protection against physical and cold.
notes: Soft feathers cushion physical blows and insulate against cold.

name: Padded / Cloth
desc: Light fabric padding provides minimal protection.
notes: Minor padding reduces cutting and cold damage slightly.

name: Leather / Hide
desc: Cured hide or leather armor providing moderate protection.
notes: Good vs slashing. Poor vs bludgeoning and energy.

name: Chain Mail
desc: Interlocking metal rings. Excellent vs slashing and piercing.
notes: Strong vs weapons. Weaker vs blunt and energy.

name: Full Plate
desc: Solid metal plate offering superior protection in most categories.
notes: Best physical protection. Still somewhat vulnerable to poison.

name: Dense Flesh
desc: Thick, tough musculature typical of most large monsters.
notes: Broad physical toughness, no elemental resistance.

name: Thick Hide
desc: Rhinoceros-thick skin found on giants, ogres, large beasts.

name: Chitinous Carapace
desc: Hard insect or crustacean shell. Excellent vs piercing and slashing.
notes: Very hard shell. Weaker against bludgeoning.

name: Stone / Construct
desc: Rock, iron, or animated stone golem-like construction.
notes: Near-immune to most physical and energy attacks.

name: Dragon Scales
desc: Overlapping magical scales with elemental affinity.
notes: Extraordinarily resilient. Elemental affinity may grant immunity.
